name: @lightningchart/mcp-server
description: MCP server that gives AI agents LightningChart JS source-of-truth guidance.

scripts.build: npm run generate:worker-content && tsc -p tsconfig.json && tsc -p tsconfig.worker.json
scripts.check: npm run generate:worker-content && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.worker.json
scripts.dev:worker: npm run generate:worker-content && node scripts/wrangler.mjs dev
scripts.deploy:worker: npm run generate:worker-content && node scripts/wrangler.mjs deploy
scripts.dry-run:worker: npm run generate:worker-content && node scripts/wrangler.mjs deploy --dry-run

author: LightningChart Ltd.
